title: Brachyapium pomelianum
taxonomy: Brachyapium pomelianum belongs to the family Fabaceae, which includes a wide variety of legumes. This plant is native to South America, specifically in the region of Brazil. Brachyapium pomelianum is classified under the genus Brachyapium, which is a group of flowering plants. The species is further classified under the kingdom Plantae, which includes all types of plants. At the most specific level, Brachyapium pomelianum is classified under the kingdom Plantae, the phylum Magnoliophyta, the class Magnoliopsida, the order Fabales, the family Fabaceae, the genus Brachyapium, and the species B. pomelianum.
